x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: CIs not updated in 90+ days are likely to have outdated attributes. Now Assist uses sys_updated_on as a freshness signal -- highly stale CIs are deprioritized but still introduce noise into impact analysis.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Expand and schedule discovery runs to cover all infrastructure segments more frequently. Configure daily or weekly discovery for critical infrastructure via discovery_schedule_list.do. Target: ≤20% of CIs stale at 90 days.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c61
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[CIs not updated in 90+ days are likely to have outdated attributes. Now Assist uses sys_updated_on as a freshness signal -- highly stale CIs are deprioritized but still introduce noise into impact analysis.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Stale CI Rate (90 days)</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addDaysUTC(-90);

    var gaStale = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci');
    gaStale.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaStale.addQuery('sys_updated_on', '<', cutoff.getValue());
    gaStale.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaStale.query();
    var stale = gaStale.next() ? parseInt(gaStale.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci');
    gaTotal.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return { status: 'not_applicable', actualValue: 'No active CIs found',
            finding: 'No active CIs found. Stale CI rate cannot be assessed.' };
    }

    var pct = Math.round((stale / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of active CIs not updated in 90+ days (' + stale + ' of ' + total + ')';

    if (pct <= 20) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of active CIs are stale at 90 days. CMDB data is current — Now Assist AI recommendations reflect recent infrastructure state.' };
    } else if (pct <= 50) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of active CIs have not been updated in 90+ days (target: ≤20%). Stale CI data reduces Now Assist AI accuracy — expand discovery coverage and frequency.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of active CIs are stale at 90 days. Majority of CMDB data is outdated — Now Assist AI recommendations based on this data will be unreliable.' };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>CMDB</module>
<number>CHK0006004</number>
<order>70</order>
<remediation_guidance>Expand and schedule discovery runs to cover all infrastructure segments more frequently. Configure daily or weekly discovery for critical infrastructure via discovery_schedule_list.do. Target: ≤20% of CIs stale at 90 days.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>0203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c61</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
